install:
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && (grep -qxF 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' "$HOME/.profile" || printf '
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
' >> "$HOME/.profile") && (grep -qxF 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' "$HOME/.bashrc" || printf '
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
' >> "$HOME/.bashrc") && (command -v aws >/dev/null 2>&1 || (ARCH="$(uname -m)" && if [ "$ARCH" = "x86_64" ]; then AWSCLI_ZIP="awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip"; else AWSCLI_ZIP="awscli-exe-linux-aarch64.zip"; fi && curl -fsSL "https://awscli.amazonaws.com/${AWSCLI_ZIP}" -o /tmp/awscliv2.zip && rm -rf /tmp/aws && unzip -q /tmp/awscliv2.zip -d /tmp && /tmp/aws/install --install-dir "$HOME/.local/aws-cli" --bin-dir "$HOME/.local/bin" --update)) && python3 -m pip install --user pre-commit semgrep && python3 -m pip install --user -r backend/requirements.txt && python3 -m pip install --user -e 'backend[test]' && (cd apps/admin_web && npm ci && npx --no-install openapi-typescript --version >/dev/null 2>&1) && (cd backend/infrastructure && npm ci) && (cd backend && python3 scripts/build_lambda_bundle.py --cache-only)
start:
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && (grep -qxF 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' "$HOME/.profile" || printf '
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
' >> "$HOME/.profile") && (grep -qxF 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' "$HOME/.bashrc" || printf '
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
' >> "$HOME/.bashrc") && (command -v aws >/dev/null 2>&1 || (ARCH="$(uname -m)" && if [ "$ARCH" = "x86_64" ]; then AWSCLI_ZIP="awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip"; else AWSCLI_ZIP="awscli-exe-linux-aarch64.zip"; fi && curl -fsSL "https://awscli.amazonaws.com/${AWSCLI_ZIP}" -o /tmp/awscliv2.zip && rm -rf /tmp/aws && unzip -q /tmp/awscliv2.zip -d /tmp && /tmp/aws/install --install-dir "$HOME/.local/aws-cli" --bin-dir "$HOME/.local/bin" --update)) && (python3 -m pip show sqlalchemy pytest pytest-cov pytest-mock moto pre-commit semgrep >/dev/null 2>&1 || (python3 -m pip install --user -r backend/requirements.txt && python3 -m pip install --user -e 'backend[test]' && python3 -m pip install --user pre-commit semgrep)) && (cd apps/admin_web && (( [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci ) && (npx --no-install openapi-typescript --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || (npm ci && npx --no-install openapi-typescript --version >/dev/null 2>&1)))) && (cd apps/public_www && ( [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci )) && (cd backend/infrastructure && ( [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci )) && (cd backend && python3 scripts/build_lambda_bundle.py --cache-only)
